project.project_name: Seahorse Offshore Wind Farm GP Survey

comments.comment_text: This document is a Quality audit procedure. Can you please attach the quality audit schedule to this document showing which audits you have planned and their associated timeline.
comments.summary_ko: This document is a Quality audit procedure 검토 및 수정 필요.

comments.comment_text: It is strange to see that audits are planned at the end of the project. This is more to be considered in this case as a Return of Experience. Is there a reason for not performing audits during offshore activities to check correct implementation of Quality Management System during project activities ?
comments.summary_ko: It is strange to see that audits are planned at the end of the project 검토 및 수정 필요.

comments.comment_text: Do you plan audit during the offshore activities on Seahorse project ?
comments.summary_ko: Do you plan audit during the offshore activities on Seahorse project ? 검토 및 수정 필요.
